QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Polls UniRC 7 over UDP for link status, signal strength, frequency, and channel.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable UniRC 7 (UDP)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCIp
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Default 192.168.144.20 per SIYI UniRC 7 SDK manual. Port is fixed at 19856.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UniRC 7 IP

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCTransportMode
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: UDP (network) or Serial (UART over USB). Serial is supported on Android only.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UniRC 7 Transport

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCSerialPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Serial port for the UniRC 7 datalink (Serial transport only).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Serial device used when Transport is Serial. Android only.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UniRC 7 Serial Port

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCSerialBaud
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Baud rate for the UniRC 7 serial datalink.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Serial port baud rate when Transport is Serial (default 115200).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UniRC 7 Serial Baud

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiUniRCRelayPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Local UDP port for relaying UniRC 7 MAVLink to QGC.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When > 0, SiYiUniRC binds the datalink port exclusively, parses SIYI SDK frames locally, and relays MAVLink to/from 127.0.0.1 on this port. QGC's MAVLink UDP link must listen on this same port. 0 disables the relay (SDK-only mode).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UniRC 7 MAVLink Relay Port

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiTransmitterEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Connects to legacy SIYI image transmitter for RSSI / link statistics.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable Transmitter (TCP)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiTransmitterIp
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: SIYI transmitter TCP server IP address.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Transmitter IP

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiCameraEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Connects to SIYI camera/gimbal for control and status.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable Camera/Gimbal (TCP)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: siyiCameraIp
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: SIYI camera/gimbal TCP server IP address.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Camera IP
